form.title: Contact Form
form.intro01: Our agents do not have access to more information about your loan or account than you can access online. Before contacting us, you can

intro02.1: check your loan balance online through the

intro03.1: find answers to frequently asked questions on our

form.intro05: We understand that timely access to client support is important. Thank you for your patience.
form.intro06: If you have difficulty with the following form, you can use any of our other service channels to contact us. Please read the Personal Information Collection Statement before completing this form.
form.firstName: First name(s) (also known as given name)
form.lastName: Last name(s) (also known as family name, surname)
form.contactMethodLegend: I would like the CEBA Program to contact me by
form.emailHint: Use this format: xxxxxx@example.com. For CEBA ID recovery please use the email that you applied to the program with.
form.confirmEmailHint: Type your email address again, you cannot copy and paste it. Make sure your email address is the same as above.
form.confirmTelephoneHint: Type your telephone number again, you cannot copy and paste it. Make sure your telephone number is the same as above.
form.contactTimeLegend: I would like the CEBA Call Centre to contact me
form.contactTimeNotice: The CEBA Call Centre operates Monday to Friday from 8AM to 6PM Eastern Standard Time, excluding statutory holidays.
form.reasonRecoveryHint: Recover the unique loan identifier associated to your account which will allow you to access your CEBA account statements.
form.reasonBalanceHint: Questions related to your CEBA loan balance(s).
form.reasonChange: Change in business details and ownership
form.reasonChangeHint: Including change to contact details, and death of a sole proprietor.
form.reasonPaymentsHint: Information on how to make payments to your CEBA account.
form.businessNumberHint: Your business number will be used to authenticate your account. Please enter your 9-digit business number.
form.cebaIdHint: A CEBA Identification Number is a 12-digit unique identifier allotted to each assigned CEBA Loan, the first three digits of which will always be ‘967’. Your CEBA Identification Number will be used to authenticate your account.
form.messageHint: Please explain how we can help you in the text box below. You don’t need to repeat any of the information you included in the fields above.

PICS-body.line1: The CEBA Program is subject to the Privacy Act and collects, uses and discloses personal information accordingly. You consent to the CEBA Program collecting and storing in the CEBA Program database, any personal information that you have provided in any online application or registration form or any transaction documents. Your personal information will not, without your consent, be used for any purpose other than what is outlined in this contact form except as otherwise required by law.
PICS-body.line2: You have the right to access your personal information by contacting the CEBA Program’s Access to Information and Privacy (ATIP) Office at ATIPOffice@edc.ca or by mail at 150 Slater Street, Ottawa, ON, K1A 1K3. You understand that as a registered User of the CEBA Portal, the CEBA Program may monitor, modify and track your usage of the CEBA Portal. Please refer to the
PICS-body.line4: The transmission of this information is not secure so sensitive personal information, such as your Social Insurance Number, should not be included in your message.
PICS-body.line5: If after reading this statement, you prefer not to submit your inquiry via the Internet, you may use one of the following methods:

assigned.title: My Loan Has Been Assigned to the CEBA Program
assigned.body: If your CEBA Loan has entered collections and is no longer accessible through your financial institution, then your CEBA Loan may be classified as ‘Assigned’. FAQs for assigned CEBA Loans can be found in this section.

unassigned.title: My Loan Is With My Financial Institution
unassigned.body: If your CEBA Loan is still accessible through your financial institution, then your CEBA Loan is classified as ‘Unassigned’. FAQs for unassigned CEBA Loans can be found in this section.

archive.title: FAQ Archive
archive.body: This section contains FAQs related to earlier stages of the CEBA Program.

introParagraphs: There are three Contact Centres that support CEBA Loan Holders. The appropriate Contact Centre will vary depending on if your loan has been assigned to the CEBA Program.

If your CEBA Loan is no longer accessible through your financial institution, then your CEBA Loan may be classified as ‘Assigned’. If your CEBA Loan is still accessible through your financial institution, then your CEBA Loan is classified as ‘Unassigned’.

introParagraphs.beforeLink: For any questions regarding CEBA Loans, please consult the
introParagraphs.afterLink: page. Should you need further assistance please use the guidance below. Accessibility accommodations are available if needed.

sections.heading: Assigned Loans:
items: How to inform the CEBA Program of insolvency or death of a sole proprietor

paragraphs.beforeLink: Please contact the CEBA Call Centre at 1-888-324-4201 or via the
paragraphs.afterLink: . An agent will return your calls within 3 business days between 8am and 6pm Eastern Standard Time, excluding statutory holidays.

cards.title: CRA CEBA Contact Centre

sections.heading: Assigned Loans:
items: Letters or communications received from the CRA
Add, update, or remove authorized third parties

paragraphs: You can reach the CRA CEBA Contact Centre at 1-800-361-2808.

cards.title: Financial Institution

sections.heading: Assigned Loans:
items: Your financial institution is no longer involved with the servicing of the CEBA Loan. All questions, with the exception of reason for assignment, status of payments made during or after assignment and demand letter related questions, should be directed to either the CEBA Call Centre or CRA CEBA Collections.

paragraphs: Please refer to the Financial Institution that provided your CEBA Loan.

form.mailSuccess: Your message was sent successfully. An agent will respond to your request.
form.mail-fail-1: Your message could not be sent.
